home.tagline: Smart outfit suggestions from your wardrobe, perfect for any occasion.
home.freeNote: Free · No spam · For Gen Z
home.featuresTitle: Everything you need to outfit yourself
home.featuresSubtitle: From wardrobe management to virtual try-on and outfit suggestions — all in one app.
home.waitlistSubtitle: Leave your email to get notified when Fitcheck launches new features.

features.wardrobeDesc: Capture and store all your clothes in one place, clean and always in your pocket.
features.tryonDesc: Try on any outfit on your body using AI — no need to try on clothes in real life.
features.suggestDesc: AI outfit suggestions based on weather, occasion and your style in seconds.

auth.signupSubtitle: Create an account to start styling smarter
auth.accountCreatedConfirm: Account created! Please check your email to confirm your account.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.resetEmailSent: Check your email for a link to reset your password.
auth.resetSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.resetLinkInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email (with @ and a domain).
validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
validation.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before logging in.
validation.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

waitlist.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email (with @ and a domain).
waitlist.alreadyOnList: This email is already on the list.
waitlist.genericError: Couldn't sign you up right now. Please try again later.

wardrobe.title: Your wardrobe
wardrobe.itemCount: {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}} in your closet
wardrobe.setupNeeded: Wardrobe table not found. Run supabase/wardrobe.sql in your Supabase SQL editor, then refresh this page.
wardrobe.name: Name
wardrobe.saveError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences
settings.changePasswordDesc: Set a new password for your account.
settings.signOutEverywhereDesc: End your session everywhere you're logged in.
settings.exportDataDesc: Download your account info and wardrobe as a JSON file.
settings.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account, wardrobe and images. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirmBody: This permanently deletes everything. Type DELETE to confirm.
settings.deleteError: Couldn't delete your account. Please try again.
settings.styleProfileDesc: Used to personalize your outfit suggestions.
settings.profileSaveError: Couldn't save. Did you run the profiles SQL?

onboarding.title: Set up your style profile
onboarding.subtitle: Help our AI suggest outfits that fit you. You can change this anytime in Settings.
onboarding.saveError: Couldn't save. Did you run the profiles SQL? Please try again.
onboarding.stepBodyDesc: Adjust the sliders so suggestions fit you better.
onboarding.stepStylesDesc: Pick the styles you like — choose as many as you want.
onboarding.stepColorsDesc: Which color tones do you gravitate to?
onboarding.stepOccasionsDesc: Pick the occasions you dress for most.

detect.title: Scan your clothes
detect.subtitle: Snap or upload a photo — AI will detect the items.
detect.cameraError: Couldn't access the camera. Check permissions or use upload instead.
detect.detectError: Detection failed. Is GEMINI_API_KEY set on the server? Please try again.
detect.noItems: No clothing items found. Try another photo.
detect.found: Found {count} item(s) — pick which to add.
detect.name: Name
detect.addError: Couldn't add items. Please try again.
